'''Janq Paramexor''' was [[Guild Master/Legends|Guildmaster]] of [[House Paramexor]], a house of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]].

==Biography==
Paramexor was once an arrogant military officer with a high opinion of himself. However, during a duel, he was severely injured and lost the use of his legs. Forced to live the rest of his life in a [[Repulsorlift chair/Legends|repulsor chair]], Janq nearly committed [[Death/Legends|suicide]]. His comrades managed to convince him that he still had skills that could be put to use. Janq rebuilt his life and eventually formed the Paramexor Guild of Hunters.

===Trial===
Paramexor presided over the [[Reson Nath v. Imperial Prefect Adar|trial]] of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Reson Nath]]. [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Adar (Imperial)|Adar]] had accused Nath of a variety of crimes and she was to be punished as according to Guild rules. On learning that the trial involved a battle with Nath, Adar quickly dropped the charges. However, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Gorliz]], who had bet on the outcome with Paramexor, ordered Adar to participate.

Paramexor was also good friends with bounty hunter [[Kal-tan-shi]]. Even when Kal-tan-shi left House Paramexor, both of them continued to be friends and dining together.<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>
